title: Five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta May 13
summary: On May 13, YKHC reports five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 5 are residents in: Akiachak (2) Bethel (3) — COVID-19 Updates and Community Information Updated COVID-19 testing hours: In Bethel, COVID-19 testing is available at the testing site on the first floor of the h...

title: YKHC offers support to flooded communities in the YK Delta
summary: On Tuesday, May 10, the Yukon-Kuskokwim Health Corporation (YKHC) chartered a flight to Crooked Creek and Sleetmute to provide relief to the communities, which experienced flooding due to ice jams in the Kuskokwim River. A medical provider and two environmental health specialists distributed 40 case...
